<script>
jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    let timeout;

    function hideAllSubmenus() {
        $('.for_gista, .for_vantilation').hide();
    }

    $('.is_gista').on('mouseenter', function() {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        hideAllSubmenus();
        $('.for_gista').show();
    });

    $('.is_vantilation').on('mouseenter', function() {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
        hideAllSubmenus();
        $('.for_vantilation').show();
    });

    $('.for_gista, .for_vantilation').on('mouseenter', function () {
        clearTimeout(timeout);
    }).on('mouseleave', function () {
        timeout = setTimeout(hideAllSubmenus, 10000);
    });

    $('.is_gista, .is_vantilation').on('mouseleave', function () {
        timeout = setTimeout(hideAllSubmenus, 10000);
    });

    // Hide when clicking outside
    $(document).on('click', function (e) {
        if (!$(e.target).closest('.is_gista, .for_gista, .is_vantilation, .for_vantilation').length) {
            hideAllSubmenus();
        }
    });
});
</script>
